name: Grafana Cloud Observability
description: Dashboards, alerting, Loki logs, Tempo traces, Prometheus metrics via Grafana's official MCP

env_vars.description: Grafana Cloud API Token or Service Account Token with appropriate permissions
env_vars.how_to_set: grafana.com → My Account → Access Policies → Create token. Or: your-instance.grafana.net → Administration → Service accounts → Add token

tools.name: list_dashboards
tools.description: List all Grafana dashboards with title, folder, tags, and URL for quick navigation

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Retrieve a specific dashboard by UID with all panels, variables, annotations, and data source configuration

uid.description: The unique identifier of the dashboard

tools.name: query_loki_logs
tools.description: Query logs from Grafana Loki using LogQL with label and line filters, aggregations, and time ranges

start.description: Start time as ISO 8601 timestamp or relative (e.g. 'now-1h')

limit.description: Maximum number of log lines to return (default 100)

tools.name: list_alerts
tools.description: List all Grafana alerting rules with status, labels, evaluation interval, and notification channels

state.description: Filter by alert state: alerting, pending, normal, nodata, error

tools.name: query_prometheus
tools.description: Execute PromQL queries against Grafana's Prometheus-compatible data sources for metric analysis

time.description: Evaluation timestamp as ISO 8601 or Unix epoch
